prompt: A full-body anime-style 3D virtual idol girl viewed from a high angle, standing on a plain light gray studio background with a soft cast shadow to the lower right. She has long straight blue-green teal hair reaching past her waist, with blunt bangs, 2 large black ribbon bows on her head, and a dramatic red spider-lily-style floral hair accessory on one side. Her face is cute and youthful, with a trendy alt-idol gyaru-goth aesthetic, and she is posing with 1 raised hand making a peace sign close to her face while the other arm rests naturally by her side. Outfit: an oversized pink top with 2 black horizontal stripes on each sleeve and distressed black graphic print across the chest, layered under a black strappy harness dress or camisole with metal studs; a pink plaid pleated mini skirt with frayed hem; 2 black belts at the waist with silver rings and chain details; 1 hanging plush keychain pouch attached at the hip; 1 black choker and multiple layered silver necklaces. Legwear: 2 matching pink-and-black striped loose leg warmers or thigh-high coverings, with one black garter strap visible on the upper thigh. Footwear: 2 chunky black platform shoes with metal hardware. The overall fashion is Japanese jirai kei, punk, and gothic streetwear in pink and black, with glossy fabric, metallic accessories, and highly detailed clothing textures. Clean character render, crisp lighting, high detail, stylized proportions, polished game-avatar quality, centered composition.
